verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the name of Jesus In the name of Jesus We have victory In the name of Jesus In the name of Jesus Demons will have to flee

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When we stand in the name of Jesus Tell me who can stand before In the name of Jesus Jesus We have the Victory

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the name of Jesus In the name of Jesus We have victory In the name of Jesus In the name of Jesus Demons will have to flee

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who can tell what God can do? Who can tell if His love for you? In the name of Jesus Jesus We have the Victory
